name: Butter Scotch Pie-Fannie Farmer 1896 Cookbook
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix butter, flour, sugar, and salt in a bowl until well combined.
3. Beat in the eggs, then stir in the milk.
4. Spoon mixture into pie shells.
5. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Drizzle with caramel syrup before serving.
